target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible collapse of upper floors and facade; extensive debris field covering ground; structural elements like columns appear intact but non-load-bearing walls and roof sections are destroyed; damage exceeds 45% of visible target area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible debris field extends across street; multiple floors show collapsed sections; facade elements are heavily damaged with exposed structural components; damage appears concentrated on upper levels consistent with severe damage threshold.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: The building's facade is heavily compromised with extensive debris and collapsed sections; structural elements appear severely damaged with visible collapse of upper floors and walls; consistent with 45 to 75 percent of target element area damaged.

summary: Three buildings assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE: one CONFIRMED (left), one PROBABLE (center), and one CONFIRMED (right), all showing collapsed upper floors, exposed structural elements, and extensive debris fields. The overall scene depicts a narrow street choked with rubble, collapsed walls, and damaged facades, indicating widespread destruction across multiple structures. The functional impact is likely catastrophic, with complete loss of structural integrity and pedestrian/vehicular access in the affected area.
